creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dag-Erling SmÃ¸rgrav from comment #2)
Maybe I'm not setting verbosity correct, but this is what I got:

root@archon.nyi:/var/log # cat /var/log/debug.log
Oct  1 20:00:07 archon newsyslog[958]: logfile first created
Oct 10 20:15:14 archon local-unbound[12053]: [12053:0] debug: chdir to /var/unbound
Oct 10 20:15:14 archon local-unbound[12053]: [12053:0] debug: chroot to /var/unbound
Oct 10 20:15:14 archon local-unbound[12053]: [12053:0] debug: drop user privileges, run as unbound
Oct 10 20:15:14 archon local-unbound[12053]: [12053:0] debug: module config: "validator iterator"
Oct 10 20:15:14 archon local-unbound[12053]: [12053:0] debug: target fetch policy for level 0 is 3
Oct 10 20:15:14 archon local-unbound[12053]: [12053:0] debug: target fetch policy for level 1 is 2
Oct 10 20:15:14 archon local-unbound[12053]: [12053:0] debug: target fetch policy for level 2 is 1
Oct 10 20:15:14 archon local-unbound[12053]: [12053:0] debug: target fetch policy for level 3 is 0
Oct 10 20:15:14 archon local-unbound[12053]: [12053:0] debug: target fetch policy for level 4 is 0
Oct 10 20:15:14 archon local-unbound[12053]: [12053:0] debug: Forward zone server list:
Oct 10 20:15:14 archon local-unbound[12053]: [12053:0] debug: cache memory msg=66072 rrset=66072 infra=7808 val=66288
Oct 10 20:15:14 archon local-unbound[12053]: [12053:0] debug: new control connection from local 
root@archon.nyi:/var/log # cat /var/unbound/unbound.conf 
# This file was generated by local-unbound-setup.
# Modifications will be overwritten.
server:
        username: unbound
        directory: /var/unbound
        chroot: /var/unbound
        pidfile: /var/run/local_unbound.pid
        auto-trust-anchor-file: /var/unbound/root.key
        verbosity:      3

include: /var/unbound/forward.conf
include: /var/unbound/lan-zones.conf
include: /var/unbound/control.conf
include: /var/unbound/conf.d/*.conf
